President Ursula von der Leyen travelled to Kyiv on 15 July for her eleventh wartime visit to Ukraine, where she was awarded the inaugural Order of Europe, a n...

top_signals.title: Truck tractors hauled 132 pounds of cocaine to Florida, sheriff says
top_signals.summary:
One working tractor towed two disabled units while cocaine allegedly traveled inside a sleeper compartment. The investigation led to nine arrests and a $2.1 million seizure.

The post Truck tractors hauled 132 pounds of cocaine to Florida, sheriff says appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Samsung Biologics to acquire Switzerland's PolyPeptide Group in $1.8 billion all-cash deal
top_signals.summary: Samsung Biologics acquires PolyPeptide Group for 2.7 trillion won ($1.8 billion)
